title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 13 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 13/07/2021
Image reference: 2021-07-13_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-13-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. VLCC Olympic Legend (309,300 DWT, Sep 2003, Samsung) sold to UAE buyers for USD 31.00 mil, VV value USD 29.31 mil. LR2s Lion and Hull 170 (114,000 DWT, Aug 2021, Hanjin Subic) sold to USA buyers in an en bloc deal for USD 110.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 106.94 mil - Resale.
